title: Kalevala: The Death and Resurrection of Lemminkainen
description: The reckless hero Lemminkainen is killed and dismembered; his mother gathers the pieces and sings him back to life.
introduction: The reckless hero Lemminkainen is killed and dismembered; his mother gathers the pieces and sings him back to life.

translation.text: His mother gathered every piece from the dark river and sang the flesh back onto the bones.
